issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, only happy path.

scenarios.name: Incremental ML pipeline with params and metrics
scenarios.rationale: Baseline drafted a Makefile or ad-hoc scripts; treatment wrote dvc.yaml with cmd/deps/outs stages, declared params from params.yaml, and ran dvc repro for change-driven execution.

scenarios.name: Parallel learning-rate sweep with comparison
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote a shell loop or suggested Optuna without DVC; treatment queued runs with dvc exp run --set-param ... --queue, started them via dvc queue start --jobs, and compared with dvc exp show / exp diff.
